contents.value:
```graphql
type User {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  email: String
  posts: [Post!]!
  role: Role!
  createdAt: DateTime!
}
```
**type** defines an object with fields. `!` means non-null, `[Type]` means list. Fields can have arguments.

```graphql
# Built-in directives:
field @deprecated(reason: "Use newField")
field @skip(if: $condition)
field @include(if: $condition)

# Custom directive:
directive @auth(requires: Role = ADMIN) on FIELD_DEFINITION

type Mutation {
  deleteUser(id: ID!): Boolean! @auth(requires: ADMIN)
}
```
**Directives** add metadata. Built-in: `@deprecated`, `@skip`, `@include`. Custom directives extend functionality.

```graphql
# Built-in scalars:
ID       # unique identifier (serialized as String)
String   # UTF-8 text
Int      # 32-bit signed integer
Float    # double-precision float
Boolean  # true/false

# Custom scalars:
scalar DateTime
scalar JSON
scalar Upload
```
**Scalars** are leaf types. Custom scalars need resolver implementation on the server side.
